title: Fields
subtitle: Define the dynamic attributes that every item in this organization carries.
no_fields_hint: Add your first dynamic attribute to start tracking custom data on every item.

form.label: Label
form.label_hint: How the field appears in forms and table headers.
form.key_hint: Machine identifier. Lowercase, snake_case, immutable once created.
form.data_type_hint: How the field is stored and validated. Cannot be changed later.
form.required_hint: Items cannot be saved without a value for required fields.
